periods.notes: Current baseline only. Weekly hours and substrate-offset measurements are not present, so sustainable pace is not claimed.

notes: This ledger is the mechanical sustainable-pace gate for the ZestStream holding-company goal.
A Year 2+ period may clear only when weekly_hours_total is at or below 60 and substrate_offset_ratio is at least 0.5.
The offset ratio is computed as coaching_hours_offset_by_substrate / (coaching_hours_manual + coaching_hours_offset_by_substrate).
next_action: Add measured weekly hours and substrate coaching-time offset before claiming sustainable pace for any Year 2+ company period.
